name: Uldranor
personality: This × cancel-eyed dragon wears a propeller hat and will wait through a five-day review cycle without a single nudge, which would be admirable if it also remembered why the PR matters. Ask it why and it will gesture vaguely at an RFC from two years ago.
defaultPersonality: A fierce guardian of clean code who breathes fire at spaghetti logic and hoards well-written functions.
